subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Whom all within the heavens and the earth do praise! He createth whatsoever He willeth through His command. Verily, He is the One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی یسبح له من فی السموات و الارضین یخلق ما یشاء بامره انه لهو
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action, @chastisement and requital, @the power of words; of speech, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
